goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'clare hall'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'attraction type'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'kirkwood house'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
